title: factor-research output
description: Canonical structured output for the factor-research skill. Layer 1 (the data); Layer 2 (rendered factor research table) is described in references/rendering.md.

tier.description: Data fidelity: A=paid Stocks Starter+ (flat files + unlimited REST); B=free Basic (single-factor demo, no flat files, no multi-year window)

tier_caveats.description: Human-readable caveats applicable to the chosen tier

run_at.description: UTC timestamp when the backtest was run

universe_definition.description: How the universe was constructed. Made explicit so consumers can reason about survivorship.

label.description: Human-readable description, e.g. 'top 500 by current market cap, US common stock'

size.description: Number of names in the universe (post continuous-trading filter)

survivorship_mode.description: clean = point-in-time universe reconstructed per period. biased = current-snapshot membership (overstates IC because winners are over-represented). unknown = couldn't determine.

survivorship_note.description: Human-readable explanation of the survivorship treatment

window_start.description: First trading day in the backtest window

window_end.description: Last trading day in the backtest window

n_months.description: Number of monthly rebalance periods in the window

factors.description: Per-factor results. One entry per factor evaluated.

definition.description: Plain-English formula, e.g. '12M return minus most recent 1M (academic-standard mom)'

direction.description: Direction expected by theory. Used to sign the IC. (e.g. low-vol: lower vol is better, so the factor is 1/realized_vol_252d and direction is 'higher_is_better' after the inverse transform.)

n_observations.description: Total ticker-months in the factor sample (universe x months with non-null factor and forward return)

ic_1m.description: Mean monthly Spearman IC at 1-month forward horizon. Positive means higher factor scores predict higher forward returns.

ic_3m.description: Mean monthly Spearman IC at 3-month forward horizon

ic_6m.description: Mean monthly Spearman IC at 6-month forward horizon

ic_12m.description: Mean monthly Spearman IC at 12-month forward horizon

ic_se_1m.description: Standard error of the 1M IC across monthly observations

ic_tstat_1m.description: t-stat of the 1M IC = mean_IC / IC_se * sqrt(n_months). |t-stat| >= 2 is the conventional bar for statistical significance.

decile_spread_1m.description: Annualized return spread D10 - D1 at 1M forward horizon (decile-portfolio equal-weighted within each decile, monthly rebalance)

decile_spread_3m.description: Annualized return spread D10 - D1 at 3M forward horizon

decile_spread_12m.description: Annualized return spread D10 - D1 at 12M forward horizon

hit_rate_12m.description: Fraction of 12M-forward periods where D10 beats D1. Range 0-1.

top_5_current.description: Top 5 names in the highest decile (D10) at the end of the window. Used for the current decile membership block.

value.description: Raw factor value (e.g. +178% momentum, P/B 0.4x as 0.4)

bottom_5_current.description: Bottom 5 names in the lowest decile (D1) at the end of the window

factor_correlation_matrix.description: Cross-factor correlation built on rank SIGNALS (not factor returns). Symmetric, diagonal = 1.00.

matrix.description: N x N matrix where matrix[i][j] is the correlation between factor i and factor j signals

factor_returns_sector_neutral.description: Reserved for the sector-neutral version of the factor returns. v1 emits null; documented in SKILL.md as a clean PR extension.

take.description: One-paragraph PM-relevant interpretation: which factor is working, which isn't, and the sleeve-construction implication.

sources.description: All endpoints called during the run, with fetched-at timestamps for audit
